title: Congress (disambiguation)
content:
'''Congress''' can refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Galactic Senate]]''', also called the '''Congress of the Republic''' or '''Galactic Congress'''
*'''[[New Republic Senate]]''', also called the '''Galactic Congress'''

==Legends==
*A term for the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] and [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]]
*A delegation to the Galactic/Imperial Senate
*The [[Jabiim Congress]]
*The [[Lijuter Congress]]

{{Disambig}}

[[Category:Legislatures|*]]
